revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-185

Alternative term: Revolving Optic

An assembly of one or more optical panels revolving about a vertical axis, and intended to produce a flashing light by Method a. of Note 1: to 2-2-180.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Rotating Optic}}
